title: this is from applying risk management every single day being a sniper on 20-30 trades. Steadily growing it.A lot of work went into this and that’s why I am very proud.
author: Independent_Gur8648
selftext:
Beyond proud of this and just wanted to share. I did this to prove a point. To show people the power of options if you know what you’re doing. To show that it’s completely realistic and possible to go from small money to big money. Beginner traders will spend years throwing mine into their accounts thinking this time will be different. But they do the same thing with the larger money that keeps losing them the small money. This is proof for everyone and we’re about to do it all again. Not giving myself a 4 week target like the last one but we’ll see how quick we can scale it. We already brought $1k to $70k+ within 4 weeks being in out on most plays the same day. We now started the second $1k account challenge today and got it up 80%. 

I’ve set up a discussion group where, in my spare time, I share my personal market insights and discuss potential risks as well as specific entry points with the members. It is completely free of charge; we are simply a community dedicated to mutual exchange and learning. If you are interested in joining, you are more than welcome to send me a direct private message at any time.

Talk about starting off with a bang. Hope everyone had a lovely day!

comments.author: -Sliced-
comments.body: Share the trades or it didn’t happen
